title: Add Imagipedia to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Imagipedia](https://imagipedia.vercel.app/) to build
- Generate AI images in Imagipedia using Pollinations as its processing backend. Use it as a creative studio for creating image outputs.

Fixes #11982

gist.headline: Welcome to Imagipedia
gist.blurb: A new creative studio joins the hive! Imagipedia is now live in the Greenhouse, using Pollinations to generate stunning AI images.
gist.summary: Added Imagipedia, a new creative studio app powered by the Pollinations image generation backend, to the community Greenhouse.
gist.impact: Creators can now explore and use Imagipedia as a dedicated studio interface for generating AI images.
gist.visual_concept: Imagipedia suggests an encyclopedia or library of images. The scene should feature Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot in a cozy studio or library setting, looking at a glowing book or canvas where images are magically appearing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, hovering over a glowing magical encyclopedia. Small pixelated images and colorful sparks float up from the pages. A chunky retro monitor robot stands nearby, holding a tiny picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
